tool_args.label: MTA Metro-North Railroad Financial and Ridership Reports – July 2025
tool_args.raw_text: MTA Metro-North Railroad Financial and Ridership Reports – July 2025. Steven Weiss, Financial Liaison.

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

tool_args.label: Total revenue YTD July 2025 - $568.7M
tool_args.raw_text: Total revenue of $568.7 million was $1.2 million lower than the July Forecast.

tool_args.label: Total ridership YTD July 2025 - 40.5M
tool_args.raw_text: Through July 2025 ridership was 40.5 million, 6.5% above 2024, 19.1% below 2019 pre-COVID levels and 0.1% above the Forecast.

payload.comparison: 6.5% above 2024, 19.1% below 2019 pre-COVID levels, 0.1% above Forecast

comparison_normalized.raw_text: 6.5% above 2024, 19.1% below 2019 pre-COVID levels, 0.1% above Forecast

tool_args.label: Commutation ridership YTD July 2025 - 16.1M
tool_args.raw_text: Commutation ridership of 16.1 million was 10.7% above 2024 and 2.6% below the Forecast.

tool_args.label: Non-commutation ridership YTD July 2025 - 24.4M
tool_args.raw_text: Non-commutation ridership of 24.4 million was 4.0% above 2024 and 2.0% above the Forecast.

tool_args.label: Farebox revenue YTD July 2025 - $372.5M
tool_args.raw_text: Farebox revenue of $372.5 million was $5.8 million higher than the Forecast.

tool_args.label: Total expenses before non-cash liability adjustments YTD July 2025
tool_args.raw_text: Total expenses before non-cash liability adjustments of $1,110.1 million were $2.3 million or 0.2% favorable to the Forecast.

tool_args.label: Total headcount end of July 2025 - 6,714
tool_args.raw_text: At the end of July, total headcount was 6,714, which was 77 lower than the Forecast of 6,791.

tool_args.label: Adjusted Farebox Operating Ratio YTD July 2025 - 47.1%
tool_args.raw_text: The year-to-date July Adjusted Farebox Operating Ratio was 47.1%, which was higher than the Forecast due to higher farebox revenue.

tool_args.label: Adjusted Cost per Passenger YTD July 2025 - $22.41
tool_args.raw_text: The year-to-date July Adjusted Cost per Passenger was $22.41, which was higher than Forecast.

tool_args.label: Revenue per Passenger YTD July 2025 - $9.19
tool_args.raw_text: The year-to-date July Revenue per Passenger was $9.19, which was higher than the Forecast.

tool_args.raw_text: Total expenses before non-cash liability adjustments of $1,110.1 million were $2.3 million or 0.2% favorable to the Forecast.
